LanguageData.LetterLostRoyalTitle: {PAWN_labelShort} no longer holds the rank of {TITLE} with {FACTION_name}.
LanguageData.LetterRewardsForNewTitle: To honor {PAWN_labelShort} advancing to the rank of {TITLE}, {FACTION_name} has sent {PAWN_objective} the following reward(s):
LanguageData.LetterPartBestowingExtraHonor: {PAWN_labelShort} received {1} Votes as a sign of respect from {FACTION_name}, for gathering {3} spectators.
LanguageData.LetterPartNoExtraHonor: {PAWN_labelShort} received no extra Votes since there weren't many spectators.
LanguageData.LetterTextHonorAward_BanditCamp: Who should be credited with {0} Votes for defeating the bandit camp?
LanguageData.LetterTextBestowingCeremonyTitleUpdated:
{TARGET_definite} has gained new rank since the bestowing ceremony was scheduled. In order for bestowing to match the new rank, another ceremony will be scheduled soon.
The new bestowing ceremony will include the cryptid insight rewards for all ranks which were not yet awarded.
LanguageData.LetterTributeCollectorArrival:
An enclave representative from {FACTION_name} is approaching.\n\nThey will accept any prisoners and resources you offer as tribute. The one who gives over the tribute will receive {FACTION_royalFavorLabel} for supporting the enclave.
You can expect an enclave representative to arrive roughly twice per year as long as you are not enemies with {FACTION_name}.
